final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style news/editorial photograph for a 微博 trending post, wide 16:9 banner format.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end smartphone documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide horizontal 16:9 with generous negative space for text overlay; main scene extends across full width
Subject: must include a city skyline at dusk with neon lights beginning to glow, hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk environment — neon-lit street level below, golden-hour high-rise reflections above
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-contrast golden-hour-to-neon transition atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-cool dusk direction with vivid neon accents — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, 8K-textured photorealistic surface quality — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, bold primary headline, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal framing; layout must leave sufficient clear zones for text overlays without crowding the scene
Avoid:
